mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.member_id, r.role_key as roleKey, i.identity_name as identityName, g.group_name as groupName, f.college_name as collegeName, f.major_name as majorName FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN sys_identity i ON u.identity_id = i.id LEFT JOIN sys_group g ON u.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_faculty_major f ON u.faculty_id = f.id WHERE u.member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
